name: Democrats.org
subject: Fwd: Our new health care ad
body:
We need your help to save affordable health care.
---
**We've seen the Senate GOP's secret bill, so we launched a new ad to hold Republicans accountable on health care.

Chip in $3 or whatever you can to help us keep it on the air and keep getting the word out about the GOP's health care repeal:

**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4e2/2054605156/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")****
Derek --

On Thursday, Senate Republicans released the details of the health care repeal they've been toiling away in secret on -- and it's even worse than we thought. _The Washington Post_ called it "one of the biggest cuts to the social safety net in history."

The only thing that can stop this bill from becoming law is if Republicans hear directly from their constituents that they need to oppose this repeal bill or lose their jobs. That's why we launched our new, hard-hitting ad.

**But we need your help to make sure we can keep getting the word out. If you can, pitch in $3 or more:**

**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4e3/2054605156/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")**
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
Sender: Tom Perez
Date: Thu, June 22, 2017
Subject: BREAKING: Our new health care ad

Friend --

Republicans thought they could work in secret to take away our health care and get away with it.

They're wrong.

Today, we're launching a brand new ad targeting Senate Republicans. **[Take a look, and then pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help us keep it on the air and keep holding Republicans accountable.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4e0/2054605156/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Take+a+look+and+then+pitch+in+10+or+what&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")**

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4e1/2054605156/VEsC/ "http://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")
House Republicans voted to take health care away from 23 million Americans and decimate Medicaid -- and then rushed over to the White House to celebrate Donald Trump.

So we're shining a bright light on the Republican senators who want to do the same thing. Republicans can hide all they want, but we'll make sure their constituents know the facts.

We need grassroots supporters like you to help us keep the pressure on the GOP. Chip in $3 or whatever you can today so we can keep this ad running and get the word out about the GOP's health care repeal.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4ee/2054605156/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/health-care-ad?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4ef/2054605156/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/health-care-ad?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4ec/2054605156/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/health-care-ad?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4ed/2054605156/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/health-care-ad?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4ea/2054605156/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/health-care-ad?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4eb/2054605156/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd")
** Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4e8/2054605156/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4e9/2054605156/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4f6/2054605156/VEsHBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052333f/4067b0a/3491f7a29/7e68d4f7/2054605156/VEsHAQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170624_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Democrats.org
subject: A message from President Obama:
body:
Help Democrats protect affordable health care. **Stand with President Obama: tell Senate Republicans to protect affordable health care for every American.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-Republican-Health-Care-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170624_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170624_dnc2_nd")**

name: ALERT (via DSCC)
subject: Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren & Barack Obama are counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Senate Democrats are doing everything in their power to stop the GOP repeal bill. Now they're counting on you.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170624-AlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

Democratic leaders are speaking out against the GOP health care repeal and they're not mincing words:

_Elizabeth Warren said:_
"I'll fight this mean, scary, reckless, shameful, heartless Senate GOP health care bill every way I can."

_Bernie Sanders said:_
"Let us be clear and this is not trying to be overly dramatic: Thousands of people will die if the Republican health care bill becomes law."

_Barack Obama said:_
"If there's a chance you might get sick, get old, or start a family -- this bill will do you harm."
This bill would be an absolute disaster for working Americans, and Senate Democrats are counting on your support to fight back before the vote next week.

[**We 're running ads right now to pressure key Republicans -- chip in $1 immediately to keep our ads on air and call out the cruelty of the Republican repeal plan.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170624-AlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Now that the bill is public, Mitch McConnell is speeding toward a vote before Americans have a chance to learn just how awful this bill really is.

Senate Democrats are doing everything in their power to highlight the harm this bill would cause and we're backing them up with ads in Republican-held states that call out the cost of the GOP plan.

**Now, it 's up to you. Stand with Democrats and chip in $1 right now to keep our ads on air and pressure Republicans to drop this catastrophic bill before the vote:**

[**http://dscc.org/drop-Obamacare-repeal**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170624-AlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e462/2b07114c/211187d8/7310cf31/1735668519/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e462/2b07114c/211187d8/7310cf30/1735668519/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e462/2b07114c/211187d8/7310cf33/1735668519/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Debbie
subject: ALERT: An opponent...already
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| You read that right, friend. It is June of 2017 and I have an opponent already.

This is one of the earliest times in an election cycle an opponent has filed against me.

Having an opponent this early means we will have to get an early start as well.

**And you all know that regardless of the opponent, I 'm going to run my election the same way I do each time: by running a door-to-door grassroots campaign.**

To me, every election is an opportunity to dust off the sneakers and connect with communities large and small, on issues near and dear.

But again, to be prepared, the key to victory is an early start. Our FEC fundraising deadline is at the end of the month, and we have to use this as our opportunity to show our strength. [_**Our goal is $25,000 -- can you help us hit it?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec2/622b7b5b/3c70e5a/307bc664/2879829551/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170624z?refcode=dwse170624z_m&recurring=true&amount=5")

[_**Rush in a contribution >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec2/622b7b5b/3c70e5a/307bc664/2879829551/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170624z?refcode=dwse170624z_m&recurring=true&amount=5")

Let me be clear. No matter who runs against me, I'm going to focus as I always do, on addressing the needs and concerns of South Florida families. I will continue fighting to expand affordable and accessible health care options. I will push for sustained action on climate change and increased efforts to protect our environment. And I will never stop defending the programs that so many of our seniors, children, and persons with disabilities depend on for their wellbeing.

My opponents will come after me in a lot of ways. They always do. But I've grown thick Gator skin over the years -- and I won't back down when it comes to advocating for the issues that matter most.

[_**I don 't do anything halfway. I need you with me. Can you help us stand strong with a $5 contribution?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec2/622b7b5b/3c70e5a/307bc664/2879829551/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170624z?refcode=dwse170624z_m&recurring=true&amount=5")

Thank you for your support,

Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec2/622b7b5b/3c70e5a/307bc667/2879829551/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

And I will never stop defending the programs that so many of our seniors, children, and persons with disabilities depend on for their wellbeing. My opponents will come after me in a lot of ways. They always do. But I've grown thick Gator skin over the years -- and I won't back down when it comes to advocating for the issues that matter most. "" Thank you for your support, Debbie | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe
